hyperedges.label: Sub-agent Orchestration Pattern
hyperedges.description: Multiple AI tools (OpenClaw, Kimi K2.5, Claude Code) implement sub-agent orchestration patterns where a main agent spawns and coordinates specialized sub-agents for parallel task execution.
hyperedges.source_file: 20260214-OpenClaw-OpenCode-オーケストレーション-サブエージェント-Aivis-鈴木AIエージェンシー.html

hyperedges.label: MCP Integration Ecosystem
hyperedges.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) serves as an integration layer connecting various tools (N8N, Arcade, Linear, GitHub) to AI models like Claude. Tools expose their capabilities as MCP servers that AI agents can call.

hyperedges.label: Big Tech AI Model Competition
hyperedges.description: Major tech companies (OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, Alibaba) compete in developing advanced AI models and tools. Each company offers distinct models with unique capabilities: multimodal generation (GPT Image 2), benchmark dominance (Gemini 3 Pro), computer control (Gemini 2.5), agent SDKs (Claude Agent SDK).
hyperedges.source_file: 20260428-AIエージェント全体像-非エンジニア向け解説-5パターン分類-無料ツール3選.html
